source_name: DCCEEW National Greenhouse Gas Inventory - emissions by sector

fields.primary_source_document: DCCEEW Quarterly Update — Table 1 'Emissions by sector'.
fields.keying_plan: Key Mt CO2-e per sector for the latest quarter and the same quarter five years prior so the page can show direction. Note that LULUCF is often a net sink and is reported separately.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed sectoral emissions Mt CO2-e. Electricity has historically been the largest single sector (~30%); transport is second (~20%). Sector definitions follow IPCC categories used in the National Inventory Report.
citation: DCCEEW, Quarterly Update of Australia's National Greenhouse Gas Inventory.
